fields.Name: GrowthZone
fields.Description: GrowthZone Association Management System (AMS) connector — syncs contacts, memberships, groups, events, store orders, and certifications via GrowthZone REST API with OAuth2 Bearer token authentication.

fields.Name: Contact
fields.Description: GrowthZone Contact family object 'Contact'. Source: Curated OpenAPI components.schemas.Models.BackOffice.ContactBaseInfoModel.

fields.Name: ContactId
fields.Description: Primary key — addressing-path proof (path '/api/contacts' addresses a record by ContactId) + naming convention.

fields.Name: UIVersion
fields.Description: Enum: 0 - Version1; 1 - Version2

fields.Name: SystemContactTypeId
fields.Description: Enum: 1 - Individual; 2 - Organization; 3 - Family; 4 - ThirdPartyApi

fields.Name: CategoryTypeId
fields.Description: Enum: 1 - BusinessContact; 2 - IndividualContact; 3 - Contact; 4 - StoreItem; 5 - Membership; 6 - SalesOpportunity; 7 - Content; 8 - Job; 9 - HotDeals; 10 - Event; 11 - Projects; 12 - Certifications …

fields.Name: MembershipTypeId
fields.Description: PK (soft, weak) + FK — MembershipTypeId is the only integer identity in the source AddEditMembershipLevelsModel; the IO is a 1:1 MembershipType->levels-config record (actual per-level records nest in the Levels[] field). Emitted as soft PK to avoid stalling CodeGen; refine at runtime D4. Also FK to MembershipType.
